entry_note: Shorted top of post-open pop (day-high 3.26 rejected 2x). First red day after +114.9% Jun4 clinical-data (Phase1 OASIS) spike; gapped -38% pre-mkt. Float ~3.35M, Jun4 vol 44.3M (~13x). Sized risk-based (~5% equity to 4.75 stop) = 31200 sh, smaller than half-account because move pre-ran (lower odds) + wide stop.
exit_note: MFE ~+$12k at the 10:00 flush low (2.76) across 3 flushes (~9:42/9:50/10:00). Then a volume squeeze 2.92->3.13 (~10:11) stalled below the day high, then BROKE the day high to 3.32 at 10:22 = first-red-day thesis invalidated. Covered 3.35 on the pre-set day-high invalidation to cap loss vs the far 4.75 hard stop. Paper acct, $0 comm/locate.

entry_note: Shorted the top of the post-open failed push at the retest of the day high $5.18 (entry 5.10 @09:32:58 ET). SPHL +123.9% Fri 6/5 to $5.35 close; parabolic arc $10.71->$5.35 rolling over INTO the close, opened red Mon = textbook first red day / low-hanging fruit. Float ~1.37M (avg of finviz 1.24M & stockanalysis 1.50M; dropped the 4.5M TradingView outlier), Fri vol 40.6M = ~30x float. Newsless low-float pump (NO fundamental catalyst) -> favorable continuation, the opposite of INDP. Risk-based size 30000 (kept well under half-account due to the violent pre-mkt round-trip $2.39-$10.71).
exit_note: Covered 3.31 @10:27:58 ET (+$53,700, -35% from entry) into the LULD halt cascade. Path: 5.10 entry -> 4.30 (9:43 flush) -> coiled ~4.51 -> dropped to 4.00 and HALTED at 10:10 (indicative ~3.00) -> reopened 10:22 at 3.40 (low 3.09) -> repeated halts. Applied the early-agent HALT RULE: bank profit on a halt. Trailed cover-stop 5.45->5.20->4.90. Cover orders were repeatedly REJECTED during halts; a marketable buy-limit ~20% through the market was price-band rejected; a MARKET buy caught a live reopen at 3.31. Op note: cover-bot double-filled (positions-endpoint settlement lag) -> transient long 30000@3.31, flattened 30000@3.40 (+$2,700). Net account day = +$56,400 (strategy short +$53,700 + op long +$2,700).

entry_note: First red day after +113.1% c/c (0.98->2.08) with intraday spike to 4.79 rolling over into the close; 113.9M vol vs ~4.35M float (~26x); newsless pump + effective F-3 shelf (Jun 2) = dilution-type catalyst. Pre-mkt red ~1.75. Post-open pop to 1.7708 failed per Sec5, but SSR tripped at the open and blocked short fills at 1.71/1.68/1.61 (resting at/above ask never lifted for 11 min); filled 40k only after undercutting the ask at 1.58 (09:43 ET) = poor location near the coil low, 12% below the failed-push top. Rejected GELS (+197% but pre-ran -39% pre-mkt, near $0.50 short floor) and QH (+128% but ~4.8x vol/float).
exit_note: NO impatience flush ever came: 9:50/10:00 windows produced only a stall at the 1.56 day low, then the stock GROUND UP 1.56->1.78 into 10:30-10:34 and RECLAIMED the 1.7708 day high on rising volume = pre-set first-red-day invalidation (INDP rule). Covered 40k @ 1.79 avg (limit 1.84, ~2 cents slippage past the 1.77 ask). Post-cover it kept climbing to 1.84 = cover correct. Root cause hypothesis: day-after participation was DEAD (~0.5M shares by 10:30 vs 113.9M spike-day = ~0.4%), so no trapped-seller fuel for flushes; light tape let small buyers walk it up. Paper acct, $0 comm.

entry_note: CAST +140.7% Fri 6/12 (close 1.55) on 211M vol vs ~16.52M float (~12.8x); DIRECTV multifamily deal + April-warrant-expiration momentum (not a clean dilution pump). Mon pre-market it EXTENDED the parabola to a 5.86 peak (05:55 ET) then ROLLED OVER on a clear down-curve into the open = momentum-shift form (b), confirmed on the Yahoo 5D chart even though it gapped UP vs Fri's close. Opened ~4.88 and dropped immediately (no pop) per Sec5; entered SellShort 20000, paper-filled 4.67 right on the 4.71 first-failed-push bounce (good location). Proper stop = 2nd resistance = pre-mkt high 5.86. SSR not a factor (prevClose 1.55 -> 10% trigger far below).
exit_note: MISTAKE - premature cover. At 09:44 CAST WICKED to a new high 4.95 for ~4 seconds on a volume blip then instantly fell back (4.80->4.61 within 20s). I fired the day-high-reclaim invalidation on that single momentary tick and covered 20000 @ 4.69 = -$400. It was a stop-run, not a thesis break: CAST then flushed textbook - ~9:50 to 4.18, 10:00 to 3.98, last flush ~10:20 to the session low 3.89 - the full impatience cascade. Holding 20k to the 3.89 low would have been ~+$15.6k. Owner traded the real setup live: short 4.80 -> cover 3.99 = +$0.81/sh (+17%). LESSON: cover ONLY at the ~10:30 impatience flush OR a CONFIRMED sustained stop hit (a 1-min CLOSE above the 2nd resistance), never on a wick; hold through whipsaws; did NOT re-enter to recover (hard rule). Paper acct TZP5320F, $0 comm.

entry_note: CUPR +111.8% Mon 6/15 (close 8.41) on ~48-83M vol vs ~0.92M float (~53-90x). FRESH FDA 510(k) clearance (Medifly maggots) announced Mon 6/15 + Nasdaq-compliance news 6/12. Tue pre-mkt blew off to a NEW high 14.8 then collapsed -63% to ~5.5 = violent parabolic rollover, opened RED -34%. Mechanically A+ (float/vol/gain/momentum-shift/resistance all met) BUT a fresh FUNDAMENTAL catalyst = the INDP genuine-buyer squeeze risk, flagged pre-trade -> chose conservative 30k. SSR tripped at the open. Opened ~6.27 (day high 6.24), faded to 5.7; shorted the failed-push retest, filled 30000 @ 5.95 (uptick under SSR after undercutting the ask). OPS ERROR: order-status-by-id GET errored (jq parse), placed a 'reprice' that DUPLICATED -> 2nd 30000 @ 6.09 also filled = 60000 @ 6.005 avg, DOUBLE intended size (SPHL double-fill bug repeated).
exit_note: Covered 60000 @ 6.5483 avg (25k+25k+10k market clips) = -$32,600 (-9.05%). CUPR reclaimed the 6.24 OPENING day high at 09:39 and HELD above it ~10 min (6.3-6.79) - a sustained reclaim (not a CAST wick) that fired the day-high invalidation -> covered to cap risk on the oversized 60k book. OPS ERROR 2: single 60k cover REJECTED 'R100: Order would exceed max notional value' (cap ~$180-360k/order) -> clipped into 25k lots, delaying exit ~90s while price squeezed 6.40->6.58. RESOLUTION (observed; did NOT re-enter, hard rule): CUPR peaked 6.79 ~09:49 then FADED to the 5.5 day low by 10:31 = the first-red-day SETUP played out exactly. At proper 30k size with the stop at the 2nd resistance (~8.41) not the 6.24 opening high, holding to the flush would have been ~+$12k. The 6.24 opening high was a 1st-resistance (§6: 'often poked, rarely the 2nd'); the squeeze peaked 6.79, never reaching 8.41. Paper acct TZP5320F.

entry_note: CCTG +89.89% Tue 6/16 (close 1.48; intraday 0.91 open / 0.72 low / 2.09 high = rolled -29% off the high into the close) on ~122.6M vol vs ~3.01M float (~40x), an established 2024 IPO. Catalyst = NEWSLESS Nasdaq $1 bid-price compliance-deadline (Jun 15) squeeze = the favorable SPHL-type profile, NOT a fresh fundamental catalyst. Opened red ~-16% at 1.25 (pre-mkt blew to 2.09 again then collapsed to 0.83); SSR tripped at the open. SELECTION DISPUTED BY OWNER (see insights): I traded CCTG as the only fully-CONFIRMABLE qualifier over SLBT (+167%, the cleaner low-hanging-fruit shape but UNVERIFIABLE de-SPAC float) and OBAI (+108% but GREEN/up pre-mkt + a fresh fundamental catalyst). Sized REDUCED 20k (soft-floor 89.9% gain + light pre-mkt tape = lowered odds). Entry: rested a short-limit at 1.25 just under the 1.26 post-open failed-push top (SSR-legal, above the bid) -> filled on the bounce @09:36:40 ET, good location.
exit_note: Covered 20000 @ 1.37 @10:02:07 ET = -$2,400 (-9.6%). NO-FLUSH dead-tape failure = GLXG repeat (now 2x): neither the 9:50 nor 10:00 flush came; instead a sustained ~8-min grind UP 1.30->1.37 on light tape (first-20-min vol ~290k vs the 122.6M Tue spike = ~0.24%, no trapped-seller fuel). Covered on the confirmed grind-up through BOTH flush windows + session-high reclaim (sustained over many 1-min bars, NOT a CAST-type wick). The 'wait for a delayed last flush' tell did NOT apply -- it requires the first two flushes to have HAPPENED as confirmation; neither did. Post-cover CCTG chopped 1.28-1.37 with no flush = read validated; reduced 20k size kept the loss small. Owner confirmed the exit ('I was about to tell you to get out'). Paper acct TZP5320F, $0 comm.

entry_note: PLSM +93.3% Wed 6/24 (6/23 close ~3.41 -> 6/24 close 6.59), SOFT-FLOOR ~90% (the lone qualifier; SCAG +101% failed vol/float ~3.85x and hugged the $0.50 floor). Catalyst = $7.5M private placement @4.80 (dilutive/bearish, favorable) PLUS a FRESH Ouma Health partnership (fresh fundamental catalyst = INDP/CUPR loss-mode signal). Micro float ~3.86M, 6/24 vol ~55M = ~14x. Pre-mkt blew off to 12.97 then collapsed; opened red ~5.35 and dropped to 4.71. THREE stacked caution signals flagged pre-trade (soft-floor gain + micro-float squeeze + fresh-catalyst) -> I leaned token/skip; OWNER DIRECTED the 09:29 default short + hold for the impatience flush. Reduced size 15000. The §5 pop topped ~5.18-5.28; my too-high 5.25/5.16 open limits never filled the fast -6% open drop -> finally got short via a fill-certain best-offer at the post-pop coil, filled 5.01 @09:46 ET. SSR active.
exit_note: LOSS -$11,850. DEAD-TAPE NO-FLUSH grind-up (GLXG/CCTG/EHGO family, now TAKEN as a loss): NO impatience flush at 9:50/10:00/10:30; the 4.71 low held twice then PLSM ground UP to a 6.38 session high on thin tape (regular-session vol ~0.7-1% of the 55M spike day). Owner's plan (cover ~4.63 on a break of the 4.69 support) never triggered -- support held, price reversed up. CRITICAL EXECUTION ERROR: at 10:28 ET, to cap the loss I placed the cover as a BUY-LIMIT @5.45 BELOW the rising market -> never filled as price ground up past it, leaving me stranded short ~3 hrs. Should have used a MARKETABLE cover. Finally covered 15000 @5.80 (marketable limit 6.10) at 13:48 ET when owner asked -> realized -$11,850 vs a ~-$6.6k intended 5.45 stop (~$5.2k extra loss from the stranded-limit error). Paper TZP5320F; account availableCash fell exactly $11,850.

entry_note: SELECTION ERROR (owner-corrected): ILLR met GAIN (+296.57% Thu 6/25, post 1-for-10 reverse split eff 6/23) and FLOAT (Thu vol 224M / float ~11-18M ~ >=12x) but did NOT have a clear CHANGE OF MOMENTUM -- it gapped UP +70% pre-mkt (3.05->5.18-5.30) and chopped two-sided (pre-mkt lo 2.54/hi 5.30), never a clean down-curve/rollover. Per owner, change-of-momentum is the DECISIVE criterion: NEXR (only ~90% soft-floor gain but a CLEAN red rollover + micro float) was the correct low-hanging-fruit trade. NEXR was un-shortable on PAPER acct (R40: shorting under $1.00 not allowed; NEXR @0.82) -> the disciplined call was NO TRADE, not substituting ILLR (CCTG 'don't sub a worse-shaped tradeable name' error). Catalyst favorable (reverse-split/Nasdaq-compliance pump, newsless). Borrow fee a further mark against it: ~$10.50/100sh (half owner's small real acct) vs NEXR ~$1.50 -- high fee cuts profit + raises risk -> demands tighter initial stop + faster trail. ENTRY also mistimed: shorted the mid-morning bounce 4.80 @10:14 ET (after the only clean window, the open flush 5.11->4.39) = INDP chase-mid-range mode. Sized 20k (paper acct ~$995k).
exit_note: Covered 20000 @5.19 @10:22 ET = -$7,800 (paper TZP5320F; availCash 995,361.95->987,561.95). Held correctly through the 5.11 open poke (CUPR lesson: don't cover on a 1st-resistance poke), then ILLR BROKE the 5.30 day high (2nd resistance / hard stop) to 5.48 on a +1.1M-share volume surge, SUSTAINED ~45s -> covered marketable (PLSM lesson), caught a 5.19 pullback fill. RESOLUTION (observed flat, NO re-entry per one-trade/no-repair rules): after the squeeze ILLR put in a 2nd top ~5.39 (10:38-10:42) then a LATE last-impatience flush from ~10:43, trending down to 4.44 / new low 4.29 by 11:01 ET (last_flush_may_delay, cf CUPR post-11am). So a 9:29 entry held THROUGH the 5.48 squeeze would have netted a SMALL profit now -- but high stress/risk on a $10.50-fee name with any day-high stop run out. NEXR was better risk-adjusted (owner: short 0.91 @09:29 -> cover 0.794 @10:26, +$37 on 320sh, ~86-95% capture, calm). setup_behaved='other': eventual downside but violent/late, not a clean reproducible first-red-day; loss_cause selection (shouldn't have been taken) compounded by late-bounce entry.

entry_note: OWNER-DIRECTED. JEM +267.59% Tue 6/30 (1.08->3.97), micro-float ~0.35M post 1-for-20 reverse split (eff 4/13/26), 6/30 vol 115M (~330x float) = extreme churn. Catalyst = fresh exec-director appointment (Web3/digital-asset hype) = mild fresh-news (INDP/CUPR caution). Did NOT meet change-of-momentum cleanly: gapped UP +135% pre-mkt to ~9.5 at FRESH highs (NOT a red open). Owner directed the 09:29 short on the CAST premarket-peak-rollover thesis (form-b): JEM peaked ~9.73 pre-mkt then rolled into the open (9.19->8.71 by 09:29). Agent surfaced the live-tape discrepancy pre-entry (fresh highs vs the daily 'peaked mountain'). No SSR (up +135%) -> filled marketable. Token 5000 sh (micro-float squeeze risk). SellShort marketable limit 8.30 -> filled 8.62 at open.
exit_note: WIN +$1000. Open ~8.38 -> normal S5 pop to 8.9-9.0 (correctly NOT covered) -> fast V-flush to 7.76 by ~09:33 (early, not an impatience hour) -> covered 8.42 @09:35 on the confirmed stall/reversal per owner 'get out as soon as it stops dropping'. The V-bounce was violent (7.76->8.42 in ~2 min) so prompt covering banked the win before the squeeze-back. captured ~23% of ~4300 MFE. No spring-bounce long (low @09:33 too early + 8.38 open-target already reclaimed). Paper TZP5320F; account ledger did NOT post P&L (realized 0.0) -> P&L from fills. ONE trade-day: this + the re-short (next line) are the same JEM morning move, owner-directed.

entry_note: RE-SHORT (owner 'short again'). Same JEM morning move (one trade-day per discipline). SellShort 5000 @7.90 @09:42, no SSR. LOCATION FLAGGED PRE-ENTRY as poor: 7.90 is NEAR SUPPORT / the coil low (just above the 7.76 session low), not a bounce/lower-high = the documented GLXG/EHGO/INDP 'don't short the coil low' error. Thesis: a break of 7.76 continues down into the 9:50 flush.
exit_note: LOSS -$400. 7.76 broke only momentarily to 7.64 (~09:45) then SQUEEZED straight back to 8.31 = failed breakdown (micro-float V-bounce, same pattern as leg 1). Cut per the pre-stated 'sustained 1-min close back over 8.1' trigger rather than hope past the stop (CUPR/PLSM). Placed marketable Buy/Close limit 8.60 @09:47 when last ~8.30; a whipsaw dropped it and I filled 7.98 (near-breakeven, lucky vs ~8.30 at order time). Reaffirms: on a violent micro-float squeezer every dip V-bounces -> a near-support short is adversely selected; short bounces/lower-highs, not the coil low. loss_cause=execution (entry location). Day net +$600 (leg1 +1000, leg2 -400).

entry_note: OWNER-DIRECTED FULL SIZE (owner: 'don't short with reduced size, LHAI meets all criteria'). LHAI +315.15% Wed 7/1 (0.66->2.74) on 339.4M vol, ~16.2M sh out (>=21x float), rolled -30% into the 7/1 close = textbook first-red-day. Catalyst = FRESH fundamental (Mortgage One Group acquisition + AI/GPU-financing launch) = INDP/CUPR loss-mode signal, but it gapped DEEPLY RED -37% pre-mkt to ~1.76 (UPC-6/30 analog: deep-red fresh-catalyst fades clean, don't over-weight the caution). Empty TZ locate list but paper accepted the short. Entered at the 09:30 open via 50k marketable clips (R16 caps single orders <93k; 50k works). SIZE OVERSHOT to 300k (~1/2+): 5 resting 1.75 clips filled on an open uptick before I could cancel (owner then said hold it; 1/4 is the go-forward size for this big account). Filled first 50k @1.74, rest built to -300k @ avg 1.7667. SSR did not block fills in this sim.
exit_note: Covered 300000 @ avg 1.58 (6x50k marketable Buy/Close @lim1.68, all Filled) = +$56,000 (+10.57%), the best session in the ledger (prior best SPHL +53.7k). Path: open 1.76 -> §5 pop to 1.80 (held, not covered) -> failed on 233k vol -> lower highs 1.80/1.70/1.65 -> COILED firm on 1.60 support ~16 min (09:48-10:05, tested ~6x) -> BROKE 1.60 at 10:06 and FLUSHED to the by-principle low 1.52 on 295k vol (heaviest bar of the morning, the ~10:00 impatience flush, slightly late) -> V-bounced to 1.58. Covered the whole 300k on that flush-low bounce per owner's by-principle plan (owner set the low ~1.50-1.53, adjusting upward off impatience-hour lows; captured ~76% of the 74k MFE = cover 1.58 vs the 1.52 low). Trailed the upper stop DOWN as it worked (2.19->1.80->1.70->1.66 per owner coaching). Post-cover it re-tested 1.52 then sprang to 1.63 and stalled ~1.61 = spring-bounce already ran/stalled -> DECLINED a chase-long and re-short-below-by-principle (reasonable not greedy, Ecc 5:10); stood down flat. NOTE: paper ledger did NOT post P&L (realized 0.0, availCash unchanged) - 2nd occurrence after JEM 7/1; P&L authoritative from fills + flat position. Paper acct TZP5320F.

entry_note: CLRO +101.2% Thu 7/2 (3.22->9.62 intraday high->6.48 close = -33% roll off the high into the close) on 87.2M vol vs ~0.87M float (~100x; post 1-for-15 reverse split Jun-2025) = an ULTRA-micro-float newsless pump. Fri 7/3 was the Independence-Day holiday (closed), so Mon 7/6 was the FIRST session after the spike = the first-red-day. Pre-open it held flat-green ~6.5 (no clear roll-over) so I DECLINED the 09:29 default (violent-squeezer + no momentum-shift yet; watched instead of anticipating). At the open it popped to 7.40 (09:37, the big open pop), made a lower high ~6.90, then ROLLED OVER and flushed to 5.77 at the ~09:50 impatience flush = the clean first-red-day window (7.40->5.77, -22%). I MISSED that top entry. The bounce off 5.77 was weak (only to 6.20), so I shorted the roll off that shallow lower high @6.10 (fill 10:02:47) aiming for the 10:30 flush toward a ~5.5 by-principle low. REDUCED size 12,000 sh (~$73k, ~7% of the $1.044M acct) given the missed top + violent float.
exit_note: COVERED 12,000 @ 7.09 (market) @10:13:37 = -$11,880 (-16.2%). VIOLENT MICRO-FLOAT V-BOUNCE (JEM family, now 2x): after the 09:50 flush to 5.77 the 0.87M-float SPRANG straight back up through my 6.10 entry -- 6.10->6.55->6.78->6.91(10:12) reclaiming the 6.90 lower high = a HIGHER high that INVALIDATED the down-momentum thesis. Honored the pre-set stop (cut don't hope; §6 loss-cap; §10 no-repair) and market-covered. Post-cover it pushed to a NEW HIGH 7.20 (breaching the 7.15 stop) then settled 6.89 -> the cut was correct, holding would have lost more. Cover SLIPPED 6.95->7.09 sweeping the thin offer (~$1,700 extra) -> should have used a marketable LIMIT cap, not market, on a thin low-float. P&L confirmed 2 ways: fills (6.10-7.09)x12000 AND availCash 1,044,097.59->1,032,217.59 = -11,880 (equity/realized/sharesTraded still lag on paper; availCash posted). loss_cause=EXECUTION: the setup DID offer the window (7.40->5.77); I entered LATE, shorting the shallow post-flush bounce near the low = adversely-selected into the spring. Right play was the 6.90/7.40 TOP or a stand-down on a name this violent.

entry_note: VTAK +92.23% Wed 7/8 (pc0.7127->close1.37, intraday hi1.74) = lone ~90% SOFT-FLOOR standout (only common-stock gainer near the threshold; next was NVVE +64%). Micro-float ~2.29M / 2.69M sh out, 7/8 vol 191.75M (~84x float) = heavy trapped-buyer churn. CLEAN double-top resistance 1.74 (7/8 hi) = 1.79 (6/24 prior spike hi) anchoring risk. Catalyst AMBIGUOUS: Perplexity claimed fresh patents/Flyte-revenue but misquoted the gain (said 121.76%) and Finnhub company-news showed ONLY generic top-mover aggregator noise, NO company PR -> read as a low-float technical/momentum move (favorable) but sized REDUCED for the ambiguity + soft-floor + micro-float squeeze risk. Opened RED ~-22% (o1.07) BELOW yesterday's broken 1.25-1.30 support = form-a red-on-day. Shorted the failed-push top of the normal S5 open pop: SellShort 50000 @1.11 @09:33:19 ET (SSR-legal, filled instantly). Reduced size ~5% of the $1.032M paper acct.
exit_note: COVERED 50000 @1.15 (marketable limit 1.20, filled 1.15 on the offer) @09:42:51 ET = -$2,000 (-3.60%). CUT on a CONFIRMED DEAD-TAPE GRIND-UP: after the 1.53M first-minute bar, participation COLLAPSED to 15-36k/min and price ground steadily UP 1.11->1.17 (09:33-09:42) with NO flush -- the documented CCTG/GLXG/EHGO/CLRO-7/6 loss mode + micro-float (2.29M) squeeze risk. Honored the grind-up-cut rule that prevented two ~$12k losses (CLRO 7/6, PLSM 6/25). P&L confirmed 2 ways: fills AND availCash 1,032,215.25->1,030,215.25 (equity/realized/sharesTraded lag on paper). RESOLUTION (observed flat to 10:35, NO re-entry per one-trade/no-repair): it PLATEAUED 1.14-1.17 (hi 1.1799 @10:08) through the 09:50 & 10:00 windows -- NO morning flush -- then finally rolled over 10:17->session low 1.03 @10:32 (a LATE, SHALLOW ~10:30 last-impatience flush) -> bounced 1.07. So a hold of the reduced 50k to ~1.03-1.05 would have booked ~+$3-4k. HONEST READ: the cut was a DEFENSIBLE application of the grind-up-cut discipline on the info at 09:42 (collapsed volume, no flush, squeeze risk); the setup then offered a late shallow window I missed. loss_cause=execution (exit timing). Refinement candidate (1 data point, tentative -- do NOT overturn the rule that saved 2x $12k): the name PLATEAUED SIDEWAYS below resistance (never breached 1.18 / never reclaimed the 1.20 open) at reduced size with a safe 1.22 stop -> a sideways-coil-below-resistance can still give the LATE 10:30 flush; the grind-up-CUT applies best when price BREACHES toward/through the stop or reclaims broken resistance, not when it merely plateaus red below it.

entry_note: VEEE +415.77% Mon 7/13 (base ~4.82 -> o12.24/hi36.07/close24.86) on 75.59M vol vs ULTRA-micro ~0.44M float (~172x) = SMALLEST float in the ledger (< GMM 525k). Catalyst = FRESH M&A / reverse merger w/ USFM Corp (Greenland strategic minerals); marine biz -> trust + CVRs = hot speculative story = the CLRO-7/6 fresh-catalyst micro-float SQUEEZE-risk profile, flagged pre-trade. Rejected SOBR (+177%, ALSO a fresh reverse merger [Clean World Ventures] + $2M ATM, but opened GREEN +9% = weaker signal) and QTTB (+90.7% soft-floor but vol/float only ~2.3x + biotech catalyst = REJECT). Chose VEEE as the stronger RED-open signal. Did NOT blind-short 09:29 (§5 experience exception: micro-float fresh-catalyst pops/squeezes first) -> WATCHED the open. VEEE opened RED -22% (19.30), popped 21.01 (09:30:43), FAILED and staircased down to 18.23 (-26%, ~09:33) with lower highs and NO V-squeeze = qualifying open-pop-rollover (CLRO-7/8 token-top-short form, not the GMM deep-gap-coil stand-down). Shorted the failed bounce: rested SellShort 2500 @ limit 19.00 (SSR uptick-legal, above market) -> paper-filled 20.88 near the top of the range @09:35:55 = excellent location, just under the 21.01 pop high. TOKEN size 2500 (~$52k, ~5% acct) for the 440k-float squeeze risk.
exit_note: COVERED 2500 @ 21.88 MARKET @09:43:43 = -$2,500 (-4.79%). FRESH-CATALYST MICRO-FLOAT REVERSAL (CLRO-7/6 / JLHL-7/10 / GMM-7/13 family): after my 20.88 entry VEEE briefly tagged the 18.23 low (I was +$6,625 unrealized) then V-BOUNCED straight back to 20.90, LULD-HALTED ~09:37 (UPSIDE halt on the squeeze), and REOPENED 09:41 to NEW session highs 21.72 -> 23.33 = fade thesis broken (new highs above the 21.01 pop = no bounded stop, JLHL profile). Honored the invalidation (§6 loss-cap / §10 no-repair). First cover as Buy-Limit 21.30 got STRANDED as price ran to 23.33 -> canceled + MARKET-covered 21.88 (sim filled below the 22.59 market, favorable). RESOLUTION (observed flat, NO re-entry): VEEE kept squeezing 20.23(09:47) -> 23.7(09:49) -> 24.91(09:53), recovering to ~FLAT on the day (-0.16%, back to the 24.86 prior close). Holding would now be ~-$9,850 -> the cover SAVED ~$7,350 = cut VALIDATED.
